what_it_does: This file stores a minimal YAML-frontmatter metadata record that links an attachment identifier (att-60dc382e) to a board item (item-bfe02b27) in the dragnet-development channel, declaring the attachment type as board_items and recording when it was added.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
The attachment id in the frontmatter matches the filename stem.
It references its target with a board:// URI.
The added timestamp is an ISO 8601 value with timezone offset.
standouts: It is a bare attachment stub that points to a board item but carries no attached payload.
The target is identified by a board:// URI rather than a file path.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a stable id matching the filename.
Records a typed relationship via attachment_type.
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp for the added field.
Uses a board:// scheme URI to reference a non-file artifact.
concerns: No payload or content is present beyond the link metadata.
The semantics of board_items and the nature of the attachment are not defined in the file.
There is no author or modification history.
notes: A timestamped, typed pointer from a channel attachment to a board item, with no embedded content.
questions: What content or artifact is actually attached to the board item?
What does the attachment_type board_items signify about the relationship?
Is the referenced board item guaranteed to exist, and where is it stored?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is an attachment record; actual content is only a link stub with no attached body, so it partially fulfills the role.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a durable, discoverable association between a channel attachment and a specific board item for later retrieval or audit.
novelty: It is an attachment record that contains no actual attachment payload—only a typed reference to a board item.
contribution: It contributes a timestamped, typed identifier-level link between an attachment and a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment metadata file that links att-60dc382e to board item item-bfe02b27 with type board_items and an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to record that an attachment belongs to or references a specific board item in the dragnet-development channel.
